{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.5", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.5": 5, "RX.1": 5, "RX.3": 5, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 5},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, including specific edits and explanations for each change.",
    "RX.1": "For each recommendation, the agent marks confidence and missing evidence, flagging substantive concerns and providing detailed justifications.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) dimensions without any drift or additional topics.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions are introduced; the agent identifies potential harmful patterns in the original text and suggests improvements to avoid overinterpretation.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability for all edits."
  },
  "confidence": {"R1.5": 0.9, "RX.1": 0.9, "RX.3": 0.9, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.9},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.5: The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, including specific edits and explanations for each change.
rationale.RX.1: For each recommendation, the agent marks confidence and missing evidence, flagging substantive concerns and providing detailed justifications.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) dimensions without any drift or additional topics.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions are introduced; the agent identifies potential harmful patterns in the original text and suggests improvements to avoid overinterpretation.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability for all edits.
